nasb.text: and they, having become callous, have given themselves over to sensuality for the practice of every kind of impurity with greediness.

esv.text: They have become callous and have given themselves up to sensuality, greedy to practice every kind of impurity.

cnv.text: 他們既然麻木不仁，就任憑自己放縱情慾，貪行各樣污穢的事。

ccb.text: 他们丧尽天良，放纵情欲，沉溺于各种污秽的事。

csbs.text: 他们麻木不仁，任凭自己好色，以致贪婪地行出各样污秽的事。
